summary: Verified deployment fix: GET /health on backend (127.0.0.1:8001) returns 200 with {"status":"ok"}, served OUTSIDE /api prefix. Added /app/backend/tests/test_health.py with 4 tests. Ran full regression: test_health (4), test_contact (5), test_chat_guardrail (3), test_chat_stream (3) — all 15 tests PASSED. Guardrail returns exact 'Best to email Shreyshth directly.' for off-topic prompts. /api/ endpoints unaffected. No startup errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Health probe at top-level /health returns 200. /api/health correctly 404s. All prior /api business endpoints (chat/stream, contact, root) remain unaffected. 15/15 backend tests green.
